title: HTS Tariff Rates — Cement and Cementitious Materials
source: US International Trade Commission Harmonized Tariff Schedule
chapter: 25 — Salt; sulfur; earths and stone; plastering materials, lime and cement

2523.21.00.description: White portland cement, whether or not artificially colored

2523.29.00.notes: Primary import category for bulk portland cement

2523.90.00.description: Other hydraulic cements (e.g., pozzolanic cement, slag cement)

2618.00.00.description: Granulated slag (slag sand) from the manufacture of iron or steel
2618.00.00.notes: Ground granulated blast-furnace slag (GGBFS) for cement replacement

2621.00.00.description: Other slag and ash, including seaweed ash (kelp)
2621.00.00.notes: Includes fly ash (coal combustion residuals) for SCM use

2530.90.80.description: Natural pozzolans (volcanic ash, trass, etc.) NESOI
2530.90.80.notes: Natural pozzolanic materials for cement blending
